name: agent-buildprint

scripts.check:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('/tmp/agb-check-smoke',{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('/tmp/agb-check-smoke/code',{recursive:true}); const lines=['purpose: test','runtime:','  forbidden_dependencies:','    - forbidden-runtime','state:','  required_fields:','    - done','nodes:','  act:','    input:','      reads:','        - messages','    output:','      writes:','        - done','    side_effects: []','edges:','- from: start','to: act','- from: act','to: end','acceptance_criteria:','  - passes check']; fs.writeFileSync('/tmp/agb-check-smoke/blueprint.yaml', lines.join('
')+'
'); fs.writeFileSync('/tmp/agb-check-smoke/code/index.js','export const ok = true;
')" && node ./bin/agb.js check /tmp/agb-check-smoke --code /tmp/agb-check-smoke/code
scripts.test: npm run check:spine && npm run check:mapper-output && npm run check:mapper-output:negative && npm run check && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('/tmp/agb-start-smoke',{recursive:true,force:true})" && node ./bin/agb.js start https://agent-buildprint.com/buildprints/ai-influencer-os/package.json /tmp/agb-start-smoke && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['/tmp/agb-start-smoke/.buildprint/snapshots/BUILDPRINT.md','/tmp/agb-start-smoke/.buildprint/snapshots/plans/04-wavespeed-image.md']) { if (!fs.existsSync(f) || fs.statSync(f).size === 0) throw new Error('missing '+f) }"
scripts.pack:smoke: npm pack --dry-run && rm -rf /tmp/agb-pack-smoke && mkdir /tmp/agb-pack-smoke && npm pack --pack-destination /tmp/agb-pack-smoke >/tmp/agb-pack-smoke/pack.out && cd /tmp/agb-pack-smoke && npm init -y >/dev/null && npm install ./agent-buildprint-*.tgz >/dev/null && ./node_modules/.bin/agb --help >/dev/null

description: CLI for bootstrapping, checking, and analyzing Agent Buildprints for coding agents.
